title: Nomad: In the Footsteps of Bruce Chatwin
original_title: Nomad: In the Footsteps of Bruce Chatwin
overview: When Bruce Chatwin was dying of AIDS, his friend Werner Herzog made a final visit. As a parting gift, Chatwin gave him his rucksack.  Thirty years later, Herzog sets out on his own journey, inspired by Chatwin’s passion for the nomadic life, uncovering stories of lost tribes, wanderers and dreamers.
